expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (((in0.FACILITY = in1.FACILITY) AND (in0.PLANT = in1.PLANT)) AND (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.PLANT END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.FACILITY = in1.FACILITY) AND (in0.PLANT = in1.PLANT)) AND (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.PARTNUMBER END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.FACILITY = in1.FACILITY) AND (in0.PLANT = in1.PLANT)) AND (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.FACILITY END)

(
  TO_CHAR(
    (
      CASE
        WHEN CAST((
          CAST((
            coalesce(
              CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(ENDDATE))) AS DOUBLE), 
              CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(ENDDATE))) AS INTEGER), 
              0)
          ) AS DOUBLE) IN (2, 5, 8, 11)
        ) AS BOOLEAN)
          THEN (ADD_MONTHS(ENDDATE, -1))
        WHEN CAST((
          CAST((
            coalesce(
              CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(ENDDATE))) AS DOUBLE), 
              CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(ENDDATE))) AS INTEGER), 
              0)
          ) AS DOUBLE) IN (3, 6, 9, 12)
        ) AS BOOLEAN)
          THEN (ADD_MONTHS(ENDDATE, -2))
        ELSE (ADD_MONTHS(ENDDATE, -3))
      END
    ), 
    'YYYY-MM-DD')
)
CAST((CASE WHEN (ROLLINGBALANCE_LAG1 IS NULL) THEN (OPENINGBALANCE + QUANTITY) ELSE (ROLLINGBALANCE_LAG1 + QUANTITY) END) AS INTEGER)

assert ( in0.filter(col("EndDate") <= col("LastDate")).count() > 0 )
assert ( in0.filter(col("StartDate") <= col("EndDate")).count() > 0 )
